title: neottia kashmiriana
intro: Neottia kashmiriana, also known as Kashmirian tooth-orchid, is a plant species in the genus Neottia, belonging to the orchid family. This plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neottia kashmiriana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Neottia kashmiriana is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
